text: Trump: I wrote a letter to Xi. I asked him not to give Iran weapons. He wrote me a letter, and he is saying that he is essentially not doing that.
text_zh: 特朗普：我给习写了一封信。我要求他不要向伊朗提供武器。他给我回了一封信，信中说他基本上不会那样做。

text: Trump: The Iran war could be settled “almost immediately.”
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗战争可以“几乎立即”解决。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The IDF has renewed the evacuation order in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军已在黎巴嫩南部重新发布撤离令。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike targeted a van in the Saadiyet area. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli drone strike targeted a motorcycle in the town of Babliyeh, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列空袭了萨迪亚特地区的一辆货车。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部巴布利耶镇的一辆摩托车。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: They misquoted me. I think oil will be down to the levels it was. They say that I expect oil to be high at the midterms—I don’t expect that.
text_zh: 特朗普：他们曲解了我的话。我认为油价会降到之前的水平。他们说我预计中期选举时油价会很高——我并没有那样预期。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike targeted a van in the Saadiyet area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了萨迪亚特地区的一辆货车。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: If you told me we would be at ONLY $92 a barrel, I would have been very surprised. I am very happy.
text_zh: 特朗普：如果你告诉我我们每桶油价仅为92美元，我会非常惊讶。我非常高兴。

text: Trump vs Pope Leo: Explosive Feud Over Iran War Continues The dramatic public feud between U.S. president Donald Trump & Pope Leo has continued, with Trump launching a fresh attack on the pontiff Tuesday night over Iran, as their clash spirals into realms of political power & moral authority. READ MORE
text_zh: 特朗普与利奥教皇：关于伊朗战争的激烈争执仍在继续。美国总统唐纳德·特朗普与利奥教皇之间公开的戏剧性争执仍在继续，特朗普周二晚间就伊朗问题对教皇发动了新的攻击，他们的冲突升级到了政治权力和道德权威的领域。阅读更多

text: Trump on Iran: I don’t know how much longer they can survive.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：我不知道他们还能撑多久。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 A U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance drone squawked emergency code 7700, then began losing altitude and most likely crashed into the Persian Gulf, according to FlightRadar tracking data. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate…" 🇺🇸 The Naval Safety Command confirmed in its report that an MQ-4C Triton ISR drone crashed into the Persian Gulf on April 9, as we reported . 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 据FlightRadar追踪数据显示，一架美国海军MQ-4C“海神”情报、监视和侦察无人机发出7700紧急代码，随后开始失去高度，极有可能坠入波斯湾。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠……” 🇺🇸 海军安全司令部在其报告中证实，正如我们所报道的那样，一架MQ-4C“海神”ISR无人机于4月9日坠入波斯湾。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 Axios: A small U.K. company, Skycutter, working with Ukraine’s SkyFall, won the Pentagon’s first ‘Drone Dominance’ combat drone competition, beating a field of mostly American firms. The winning system, called the Shrike 10-F, was designed with real battlefield experience from Ukraine, and uses fibre optic cable making it highly resistant to jamming. Following the win, Skycutter is set to deliver more than 2,500 drones to the U.S. military, signalling a real shift toward adopting combat-tested foreign tech—even over domestic suppliers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 Axios：一家与乌克兰SkyFall合作的英国小型公司Skycutter赢得了五角大楼首次“无人机主导”作战无人机竞赛，击败了大多数美国公司。获胜系统名为Shrike 10-F，是根据乌克兰的真实战场经验设计的，并使用光纤电缆，使其具有极强的抗干扰能力。获胜后，Skycutter将向美军交付超过2500架无人机，这标志着向采用经过实战检验的外国技术——甚至优于国内供应商——的真正转变。 @wfwitness

text: Turkish President Erdogan: They shamelessly come forward and slander our country through our Kurdish brothers, without even looking at the blood of 73,000 Gazans that has stained their hands and faces.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：他们厚颜无耻地站出来，通过我们的库尔德兄弟诽谤我们的国家，甚至不看看73000名加沙人的鲜血已经染红了他们的双手和脸庞。

text: Open Source Intel Turkish President Erdogan: The Israeli government, which is known to be dissatisfied with the ceasefire, should not be allowed to sabotage the process. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044355357372211618/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 土耳其总统埃尔多安：不应允许对停火不满的以色列政府破坏这一进程。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044355357372211618/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese Shiite scholar Muhammad Ali Al-Fu'ani: "The Lebanese government should seek international help to get rid of Hezbollah and its terrorism. Hezbollah should be placed under complete siege until they surrender or commit suicide and go to hell." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044354781590749315/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩什叶派学者穆罕默德·阿里·阿尔-富阿尼：“黎巴嫩政府应寻求国际帮助以摆脱真主党及其恐怖主义。应将真主党置于全面包围之下，直到他们投降或自杀并下地狱。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044354781590749315/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @sfrantzman : He has a point ; how will it be done? That’s the question Lebanese Minister Ghassan Salamé: "If the Israelis have been unable to produce a complete disarmament of Hamas in Gaza in more than two years… how do you expect a much smaller, much weaker army to do it in Lebanon?" "The members of that armed group are not foreigners. They are part of the population. You are not fighting against a foreign enemy." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 转推 @sfrantzman：他说得有道理；这该怎么做？这是个问题。黎巴嫩部长加桑·萨拉梅：“如果以色列人在两年多的时间里都无法彻底解除哈马斯在加沙的武装……你凭什么指望一支规模小得多、弱得多的军队在黎巴嫩做到这一点？”“那个武装组织的成员不是外国人。他们是人口的一部分。你不是在与外国敌人作战。” - 开源情报 推文

text: The Spectator Index 🇮🇳 India's wholesale inflation rate rose to 3.88%, the highest in over three years. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数 🇮🇳 印度批发通胀率升至3.88%，为三年多来的最高水平。 推文

text: Nuno Felix https://x.com/AlexTaylorNews/status/2044342023239446986/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯 https://x.com/AlexTaylorNews/status/2044342023239446986/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Zelensky: "I feel that from the very beginning, Trump said he would remain in the middle. This shows that he is not on my side, neither mine nor Russia's side. His signals are more positive towards Russia than towards Ukraine." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044349990454149506/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 泽连斯基：“我感觉到从一开始，特朗普就说他会保持中立。这表明他并不站在我这边，也不站在俄罗斯那边。他发出的信号对俄罗斯比对乌克兰更积极。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044349990454149506/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese Fouad Makhzoumi: We welcome yesterday’s meeting between Lebanon and Israel in Washington as a first step toward breaking a long cycle of conflict. We hope this path advances through balanced, gradual steps that strengthen stability, by de-escalation, reinforcing state authority, ensuring that arms are held exclusively by the state, leading to Israeli withdrawal and the reconstruction of the South. We want a Lebanon of peace and prosperity. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩福阿德·马赫祖米：我们欢迎昨天黎巴嫩和以色列在华盛顿举行的会议，这是打破长期冲突循环的第一步。我们希望这一道路通过平衡、渐进的步骤向前推进，通过缓和局势、加强国家权威、确保武器仅由国家掌握，从而加强稳定，最终实现以色列撤军和南部重建。我们想要一个和平与繁荣的黎巴嫩。 推文

text: Turkish President Erdogan: We observe with each new development that the enemies of Turks, Kurds, and Arabs are the same.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：我们从每一个新的发展中观察到，土耳其人、库尔德人和阿拉伯人的敌人是同一个。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iran’s intelligence ministry announced the arrest of 35 individuals across six provinces, including the founder and leader of a alleged separatist group linked to Israel, weapons smugglers, and alleged operatives allegedly connected to the Mossad. The group was allegedly responsible for alleged bombings and alleged assassinations in Khuzestan province. Two alleged weapons smuggling cells were dismantled, with 42 firearms allegedly seized. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗情报部宣布在六个省逮捕了35人，其中包括一个与以色列有关的所谓分裂主义组织的创始人和领导人、武器走私者以及据称与摩萨德有关的所谓特工。该组织据称应对胡齐斯坦省的所谓爆炸和所谓暗杀事件负责。两个所谓的武器走私团伙被捣毁，据称查获了42件枪支。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷Semi official Iranian media Fars reports a second bulk carrier loaded with food supplies has passed through the Strait of Hormuz and is heading towards Imam Khomeini Port. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Admin Note: This counts as humanitarian aid and was stated to be allowed through per CENTCOM guidelines. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷伊朗半官方媒体法尔斯通讯社报道，第二艘装载食品供应的散货船已通过霍尔木兹海峡，正驶向伊玛目霍梅尼港。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 管理员注：这被视为人道主义援助，根据中央司令部指南，允许通过。 @wfwitness

text: Turkish President Erdogan: I remind the baby killers who insult me and our country on social media of some truths once again. The Republic of Türkiye is not an ordinary state. No power can wag a finger at Türkiye or at the President of Türkiye.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：我再次提醒那些在社交媒体上侮辱我和我们国家的杀婴者一些事实。土耳其共和国不是一个普通的国家。没有任何力量可以对土耳其或土耳其总统指手画脚。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 TankerTrackers: A non-Iranian VLCC supertanker, capable of carrying around “2 million barrels” of crude and sanctioned by the US OFAC, has entered Iranian waters via the Strait of Hormuz with AIS active. The movement was identified and verified through…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Semi official Iranian media Fars reports a second bulk carrier loaded with food supplies has passed through the Strait of Hormuz and is heading towards Imam Khomeini Port. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 TankerTrackers：一艘非伊朗籍的超大型油轮（VLCC），能够运载约“200万桶”原油并受到美国海外资产控制办公室（OFAC）制裁，已在AIS开启的情况下通过霍尔木兹海峡进入伊朗水域。该动向已通过……识别并核实” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊朗半官方媒体法尔斯通讯社报道，第二艘装载食品供应的散货船已通过霍尔木兹海峡，正驶向伊玛目霍梅尼港。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 U.S. is weighing the deployment of up to 10,000 additional ground troops -- potentially including infantry, armor, and logistics units -- to West Asia (Middle East). This would add to the roughly 50,000 U.S. personnel already in the region, which includes multiple aircraft carriers and Marine units.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国正在权衡向西亚（中东）部署多达10000名额外地面部队——可能包括步兵、装甲部队和后勤部队。这将增加该地区现有的约50000名美国人员，其中包括多艘航空母舰和海军陆战队部队。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: We will continue to call the oppressor an oppressor, the bandit a bandit, and the murderer a murderer.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：我们将继续称压迫者为压迫者，称强盗为强盗，称杀人犯为杀人犯。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: I sincerely congratulate my dear friend Sánchez, the Prime Minister of Spain, for showing a firm stance in the face of the threats of Netanyahu, the butcher of Gaza.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：我衷心祝贺我的好朋友、西班牙首相桑切斯，他在面对加沙屠夫内塔尼亚胡的威胁时表现出了坚定的立场。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: If there is to be peace in our region, it will be achieved despite this Zionist regime. If stability is to be established in our region, it will again be achieved despite the Israeli government acting with the delusion of the promised lands. If peace is to come to our blood-soaked geography, it will likewise come despite Israel, which ties its own security to the insecurity of others. Because whenever even the slightest hope for peace emerges, Israel will try every way to sabotage it, as it has done many times before. As the front of humanity strives to extinguish the fire in our region, the network of massacre will carry more wood to the flames. Of course, while doing this, they will continue to brazenly target countries that raise the voice of peace, especially Türkiye and Spain. With their hired pens, their media, and the pawns they use as instruments, they will try to silence people of conscience. But no matter what they do, they will not be able to silence brave hearts, nor will they be able to shackle the hearts that defend truth and justice.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：如果我们的地区要实现和平，那将是不顾这个犹太复国主义政权而实现的。如果我们的地区要建立稳定，那也将是不顾以色列政府怀着应许之地的妄想而实现的。如果和平要降临到我们这片血流成河的土地上，那也将是不顾以色列而实现的，因为它将自身的安全与他人的不安全捆绑在一起。因为每当出现哪怕一丝和平的希望，以色列都会像过去多次那样，尝试一切方式进行破坏。当人类阵线努力扑灭我们地区的火灾时，屠杀网络却会向火焰中添加更多的木柴。当然，在这样做的时候，他们会继续厚颜无耻地针对那些发出和平呼声的国家，特别是土耳其和西班牙。他们会用他们雇佣的笔杆子、他们的媒体以及他们作为工具使用的棋子，试图让有良知的人沉默。但无论他们做什么，他们都无法让勇敢的心沉默，也无法束缚捍卫真理和正义的心。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: The Israeli government, which is known to be dissatisfied with the ceasefire, should not be allowed to sabotage the process.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：不应允许对停火不满的以色列政府破坏这一进程。

text: 🇺🇸 The favorite pastime of woke MAGA diehards: whataboutism. Trump shares a post from some random Twitter nobody claiming the media had no issue portraying Obama as Jesus. Two problems: 1. Obama himself never posted anything like that. 2. Trump says it’s “a doctor, not Jesus”… so why the weak damage control? 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 觉醒的MAGA死忠粉最喜欢的消遣：什么主义。特朗普分享了一位推特路人的帖子，声称媒体在将奥巴马描绘成耶稣时没有问题。两个问题：1. 奥巴马本人从未发布过类似的内容。2. 特朗普说这是“医生，不是耶稣”……那么为什么要进行这种无力的损害控制？ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian opposition media outlets report that the explosion that occurred on Imam Khomeini Street in west Tehran at around 23:40 on Tuesday was caused by an unknown device imploding next to two vehicles, opposite a checkpoint and near a Basij base. Reports are conflicting: opposition media cite locals saying some described the blast as one that was heard several streets away with shattered windows, while others say it was weak. Casualty figures have also varied—from one killed and one wounded, to one killed and five wounded, to no deaths and three wounded taken to the hospital. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗反对派媒体报道称，周二23:40左右发生在德黑兰西部伊玛目霍梅尼街的爆炸是由一个不明装置在检查站对面和巴斯基基地附近的两辆车旁爆炸引起的。报道相互矛盾：反对派媒体援引当地人的话说，有些人形容爆炸声在几条街外都能听到，窗户被震碎，而另一些人则说爆炸很微弱。伤亡人数也各不相同——从一人死亡一人受伤，到一人死亡五人受伤，再到无人死亡三人受伤被送往医院。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WaPo: The Pentagon is deploying thousands of additional troops to the Middle East as the Trump administration seeks to pressure Iran into a deal while preparing for possible renewed military action if the ceasefire collapses. Around 6,000 personnel are being sent aboard the USS George H.W. Bush and accompanying warships, with a further 4,200 troops from the Boxer Amphibious Ready Group, including the 11th Marine Expeditionary Unit, expected later this month. The influx of forces is expected to align with naval assets already in the region as the two-week ceasefire approaches its expiration on April 22. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华盛顿邮报：五角大楼正在向中东部署数千名额外部队，因为特朗普政府试图向伊朗施压以达成协议，同时为停火崩溃后可能重新采取的军事行动做准备。约6000名人员正被派往乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰及随行军舰上，另有来自拳击手号两栖戒备群的4200名部队，包括第11海军陆战队远征部队，预计将于本月晚些时候抵达。随着两周停火协议于4月22日到期，预计这批增援部队将与该地区现有的海军资产保持一致。 @wfwitness

text: Zelensky: I feel that from the very beginning, Trump said he would remain in the middle. This shows that he is not on my side, neither mine nor Russia’s side. His signals are more positive towards Russia than towards Ukraine.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：我感觉到从一开始，特朗普就说他会保持中立。这表明他并不站在我这边，也不站在俄罗斯那边。他发出的信号对俄罗斯比对乌克兰更积极。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Arrest of separatist terrorist group leader; Mossad-linked network dismantled Iran’s Intelligence Ministry announced that 35 individuals linked to terrorism, separatism, arms smuggling, and Mossad were identified and arrested across 6 provinces, preventing planned attacks. - Leader of a separatist group linked to Israel arrested in Isfahan - 4 members of two arms-smuggling cells from Iraqi Kurdistan arrested; 42 weapons seized - 30 mercenaries tied to U.S.-Israeli (including Mossad) networks detained across multiple provinces
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 分裂主义恐怖组织领导人被捕；与摩萨德有关的网络被捣毁 伊朗情报部宣布，在6个省份识别并逮捕了35名与恐怖主义、分裂主义、武器走私和摩萨德有关的人员，阻止了计划中的袭击。 - 与以色列有关的分裂主义组织领导人在伊斯法罕被捕 - 4名来自伊拉克库尔德斯坦的武器走私团伙成员被捕；查获42件武器 - 30名与美以（包括摩萨德）网络有关的雇佣兵在多个省份被拘留

text: Open Source Intel IDF: A terrorist crossed the Yellow Line in northern Gaza and "approached the troops in a manner that posed an immediate threat." Troops eliminated the operative immediately after identification. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军：一名恐怖分子越过了加沙北部的黄线，“以构成直接威胁的方式接近部队”。部队在确认身份后立即消灭了该武装人员。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel Foreign Ministry: Equating a sovereign UN member state with a jihadist terrorist organization is yet another proof of the UN Secretary-General’s failure. The UN has failed to disarm Hezbollah and failed to uphold its own Security Council Resolution 1701. Hezbollah is the enemy of both Israel and Lebanon, serving as the Iranian regime’s proxy to dominate Lebanon. Antonio Guterres should stand firmly behind genuine Israel–Lebanon peace efforts, not offer excuses for Hezbollah. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列外交部：将主权联合国成员国与圣战恐怖组织相提并论，是联合国秘书长失败的又一证明。联合国未能解除真主党的武装，也未能维护其自身的安理会第1701号决议。真主党是以色列和黎巴嫩共同的敌人，是伊朗政权统治黎巴嫩的代理人。安东尼奥·古特雷斯应该坚定支持真正的以黎和平努力，而不是为真主党找借口。 推文

text: The Spectator Index The US military is 'sending thousands of additional troops into the Middle East in the coming days', according to Washington Post report. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数 据华盛顿邮报报道，美国军方“将在未来几天向中东派遣数千名额外部队”。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah Lawmaker Fadlallah: We want a comprehensive ceasefire, no return to near-daily Israeli strikes and assassinations. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 真主党议员法德拉拉：我们想要全面停火，不要回到几乎每天都有以色列空袭和暗杀的状态。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump tells ABC he does not think there is a need to extend the ceasefire with Iran. "I think you are going to see two amazing days, I really think so." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044345554050707585/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普告诉美国广播公司，他认为没有必要延长与伊朗的停火协议。“我认为你会看到两个令人惊叹的日子，我真的这么认为。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044345554050707585/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated U.S. Vice President Vance stated that ending the funding for Ukraine is one of the decisions he is most proud of during this administration's term. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044343548460368105/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译 美国副总统万斯表示，停止对乌克兰的资助是他本届政府任期内最引以为豪的决定之一。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044343548460368105/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated "Witkoff and Kushner have confirmed their visit to Ukraine." - Zelenskyy. The President added that an exact date for the visit has not yet been set, but Ukraine is waiting for them "at any time when they are ready." tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译 “维特科夫和库什纳已经确认了他们对乌克兰的访问。” - 泽连斯基。总统补充说，访问的确切日期尚未确定，但乌克兰正在等待他们“在他们准备好的任何时候”。 推文

text: Open Source Intel HERO FOOTAGE 🔴 In Pauls, Oklahoma, Principal Kirk Moore is seen confronting and subduing a school shooter, helping save students’ lives. He is currently recovering from injuries. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044342327452238290/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 英雄镜头 🔴 在俄克拉荷马州保尔斯，校长柯克·摩尔被看到与一名校园枪手对峙并将其制服，帮助挽救了学生的生命。他目前正在从伤势中恢复。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044342327452238290/video/1 推文

text: Togo Pushes UN to Ditch Distorted World Map Showing Africa Smaller than its Real Size Foreign Minister Robert Dussey urged UN states to replace the Mercator map with Equal Earth projection that shows Africa smaller that it really is, aiming to reflect Africa’s true size & challenge long-standing distortions shaping global perception. READ MORE
text_zh: 多哥敦促联合国放弃扭曲的世界地图，该地图显示非洲比其实际尺寸小 外交部长罗伯特·杜塞敦促联合国成员国用“等积地球”投影取代墨卡托投影，该投影显示非洲比其实际尺寸小，旨在反映非洲的真实尺寸并挑战塑造全球认知的长期扭曲。阅读更多

text: NEW: The U.S. is deploying about 10,000 additional troops and multiple warships to the Middle East to increase pressure on Iran. This includes aircraft carriers and Marine units, adding to roughly 50,000 U.S. personnel already in the region. Officials say the military buildup gives the U.S. more options if talks fail, including possible strikes or even ground operations. Source: WaPo
text_zh: 最新消息：美国正在向中东部署约10000名额外部队和多艘军舰，以加大对伊朗的压力。这包括航空母舰和海军陆战队部队，增加了该地区现有的约50000名美国人员。官员们表示，军事集结为美国在谈判失败时提供了更多选择，包括可能的打击甚至地面行动。来源：华盛顿邮报

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇦🇪 Iran has vehemently rejected a UAE-backed proposal adopted by the International Maritime Organization (IMO) on establishing a so-called “safe maritime corridor” in the Strait of Hormuz, slamming it as legally-groundless and politically-motivated
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇦🇪 伊朗强烈拒绝了阿联酋支持并被国际海事组织（IMO）采纳的关于在霍尔木兹海峡建立所谓“安全海上走廊”的提案，抨击其在法律上毫无根据且出于政治动机

text: 🇦🇪 The UAE has abandoned its migrant workforce. Following the start of military aggression against Iran, thousands of migrant workers in Dubai have been left stranded, unable to leave the country. Workers from India, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, and the Philippines—who form the backbone of the UAE’s economy—are now facing layoffs, wage cuts, or forced unpaid leave, according to Tasnim News. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇦🇪 阿联酋抛弃了其移民劳动力。在对伊朗发动军事侵略后，迪拜成千上万的移民工人被困，无法离开该国。据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，来自印度、巴基斯坦、孟加拉国、斯里兰卡和菲律宾的工人——他们构成了阿联酋经济的支柱——现在面临裁员、减薪或被迫无薪休假。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 According to a Financial Times investigation, Iran significantly strengthened its military capabilities by acquiring a Chinese surveillance satellite. Leaked Iranian military documents indicate that the satellite, designated TEE-01B, was obtained by the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Aerospace Force in late 2024 after being launched from China. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 据金融时报调查，伊朗通过获取一颗中国监视卫星显著增强了其军事能力。泄露的伊朗军事文件显示，该卫星代号为TEE-01B，由伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队于2024年底从中国发射后获得。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 More satellite images of the runway used by U.S. special forces to evacuate the pilot of an F-15E fighter jet that crashed in Iran show the wreckage of two HC-130J aircraft and two MH-6 Little Bird helicopters , which were destroyed by special forces to prevent them from falling into Iranian hands, according to U.S. claims.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 更多卫星图像显示了美国特种部队用于撤离在伊朗坠毁的F-15E战斗机飞行员的跑道，显示了两架HC-130J飞机和两架MH-6“小鸟”直升机的残骸，据美国声称，这些飞机被特种部队摧毁以防止其落入伊朗手中。

text: 🇮🇷 Iran has been intensively removing debris from the entrances to its underground missile facilities, as seen in satellite images of Tabriz and Khomein published by Soar Atlas. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗一直在密集清理其地下导弹设施入口处的碎片，正如Soar Atlas发布的塔布里兹和霍梅因的卫星图像所见。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇰🇵 ⚡️ IAEA Chief Warns of "Very Serious" Surge in North Korea's Nuclear Weapons Production Capacity
text_zh: 🇰🇵 ⚡️ 国际原子能机构负责人警告朝鲜核武器生产能力出现“非常严重”的激增
